problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
